data.title: Epic 3: Git Merge Driver and Automated Sync
data.description: Goal: Transform Git from a text-based version control system into a schema-aware database manager for Grava. The system will automatically resolve conflicts when two users modify different fields of the same issue, or add different issues simultaneously.

data.title: 3.1 Git Merge Driver Command
data.description: As a Git user, I want to have a custom merge driver command 'grava merge-slot' so that Git can delegate JSONL file merging to a schema-aware tool.

data.title: Scaffold 'merge-slot' command in pkg/cmd/
data.description: Created basic merge-slot command structure using cobra and register it in root.go

data.title: Implement file reading and JSONL parsing
data.description: Read %O, %A, %B files and parse them into a map of issues indexed by ID

data.title: Integrate 3-way merge logic
data.description: Apply field-level comparison between Ancestor, Current, and Other

data.title: Write merge results to Current file (%A)
data.description: Serialize the merged results back to JSONL and write to the target file path

data.title: grava sync-status Command
data.description: Create a new CLI command that checks the dual safety hashes and compares the active Dolt datastore against the JSONL file to report the divergence/sync status to the user.

data.title: 3.2 Three-Way Merge Logic
data.description: As a developer, I want to merge changes based on Issue ID rather than line numbers so that concurrent edits to different fields don't cause text conflicts.

data.title: 3.3 Automated Driver Installation
data.description: As a user, I want to automatically configure my Git environment so that I don't have to manually edit config files.

data.title: 3.4 Integration Testing & Verification
data.description: As a QA engineer, I want to verify the driver works in a real Git environment so that I can trust it with production data.

data.title: 3.5 Automated Synchronization Hooks
data.description: As a distributed developer, I want to have Git hooks that automatically sync the Dolt database when issues.jsonl changes via pull or branch switch.

data.title: 3.6: Automated Git Integration Installer
data.description: As a user, when I run 'grava init' or a dedicated install command, I want the system to automatically register the 'grava merge' driver and install the necessary Git hooks so I don't have to perform any manual configuration.

data.title: Implement 'grava install' command
data.description: Created a new command 'grava install' that serves as the entry point for configuring a Git repository to use Grava.

data.title: Automated .git/config updates
data.description: Implement logic to use 'git config' commands to register the 'grava' merge driver with the correct command line arguments.

data.title: .gitattributes Management
data.description: Ensure 'issues.jsonl merge=grava' is present in the repository's gitattributes file.

data.title: Git Hook Deployment
data.description: Automatically deploy pre-commit, post-merge, and post-checkout hooks into .git/hooks/ during installation.

data.title: Deterministic Sorted-Key Export
data.description: Modify grava export to output JSON fields in a deterministic sorted order. This ensures the output string is stable, making hash-based comparison reliable.

data.title: Conflict Resolution Output & CLI
data.description: When merge-slot hits an unresolvable cell collision, output the conflicts to .grava/conflicts.json and exit 1 (bypassing Git text markers). Create a grava resolve command to handle it interactively.

data.title: Dual Safety Check for Import Hooks
data.description: Implement the A+C check (JSONL Content Hash + Dolt Commit Tracking) in the post-merge/post-checkout hooks before running grava import --overwrite to prevent silent uncommitted data wiping.
